title: The Indian Reserve Forces Act, 1888
full_text: The Indian Reserve Forces Act, 1888 भारतीय रिजर्व बल अधिनियम, 1888 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 188804 Act Number: 04 Enactment Date: 1888-03-02 Act Year: 1888 Short Title: The Indian Reserve Forces Act, 1888 Hindi Title: भारतीय रिजर्व बल अधिनियम, 1888 Long Title: An Act to regulate the Indian Reserve Forces. Ministry: Ministry of Defence Department: Department of Military Affairs Enforcement Date: 26-05-1888 Last Updated: 04-02-2019 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Indian Reserve Forces Act, 1888 Show all section Section 1. Title and commencement. Section 2. Division of Reserve Forces into Regular and Supplementary Reserves. Section 3. Locality of service of Reserves. Section 4. Power to make rules for regulation of Reserve Forces. Show Related Subordinates Section 5. Liability of Reserve Forces to military law. Section 6. Punishment of certain offences by persons belonging to Reserve Forces. Section 7. Reinstatement in civil employ of persons belonging to Reserve Forces on termination of periods of training, muster or Army services. Section 8. Preservation of certain rights of persons belonging to Reserve Forces when called up for training, muster or army service.
